title: justicia micrantha
intro: Justicia micrantha, also known as the small-flowered Justicia, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Justicia micrantha include its potential to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Justicia micrantha include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
